ocr_snippet: Absolute Monocyte Count 160 /cumm Absolute Eosinophil Count 60 /cumm PCT (Plateletecrit) Electrical Impedance method 1.8 Lakh/cumm Platelet Count 15.0 fl P-LCR (Platelet - Large cell ratio) 35.0 % ESR 40 mm/1st hr Westergren's Normocytic normochromic RBC, WBC - Normal.
